# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I reviewed `git diff` and read all changed files end-to-end. The diff only updates orchestration metadata (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`) and does not modify implementation code. No real bugs, safety issues, or robustness regressions were identified in the current changeset.

## Amendments

None.
